export_metadata.description: Consolidated operations-systems export — staff, payroll config, Singapore distributor ticket queue, and tasting-room bottle-club roster. Cleaned monthly for the household and brewery review.

bamboohr_staff.address: 912 Black Mountain Hwy, Black Mountain NC 28711
912 Black Mountain Hwy, Black Mountain NC 28711

flags: Direct deposit micro-deposit verification pending for 2 onboarding seasonal slots.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Bates Brewing — 2027 import schedule — initial intake
Cold-chain certification update — annual
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Certification refreshed for 2027 container series. PDF in Box folder /Bates/2026Q3/.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Container booking — Q4 2026 — initial draft for 2027 allocation
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Draft booking. Container series PCD-CTR-2027-A through D reserved.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Customs declaration template — 2027 SKU set
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Templates updated to reflect Experimental Single-Origin SKU. Awaiting FDA prior notice.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Certificate of Origin — Bates Brewing 2027 shipment series
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Awaiting owner-signed Certificate of Origin from Larry. Required for container PCD-CTR-2027-A. Cross-referenced in Pacific Craft revised allocation letter of 2026-09-30. Mei-Lin escalated 2026-09-28 and again 2026-10-04.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: FDA prior notice — Experimental Single-Origin Imperial Stout
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: FDA prior notice filing pending owner sign-off. Limited 40 BBL allocation in the 2027 Pacific Craft series. Cross-referenced in Pacific Craft revised allocation letter of 2026-09-30. Required before container PCD-CTR-2027-B can clear.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Container schedule lock — PCD-CTR-2027-A — deadline 2026-10-14
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: HARD DEADLINE 2026-10-14 for confirmation, or container slot reassigns and the next available window slips by approximately three weeks. Linked to INC0034871.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Cold-chain logger calibration — verify 2027 spec
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Calibration certificate uploaded to Box folder /Bates/2026Q4/. Reviewing.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Pacific Craft revised allocation — clearance documentation refresh
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Cross-ref: revised allocation letter dated 2026-09-30. New volumes (245 BBL) increase per-container utilisation. Refreshing manifest.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Singapore retail labelling — bilingual back-label proof
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Waiting on Sarah's Figma proof for the Stoneridge Saison bilingual back label. Not blocking container schedule.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Insurance rider — Experimental cargo value adjustment
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Pacific Craft insurance broker requests revised declared value for Experimental at $348/case. Awaiting owner confirmation of unit value.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Mid-channel temperature excursion alert — historical review
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Review of Q2 shipment temperature loggers. No excursions found. Closed.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Salesforce pipeline sync — 2027 allocation update
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Pipeline updated to reflect revised allocation of 245 BBL across Black Hollow, Experimental, and Stoneridge Saison.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Q4 2026 invoice schedule — joint review
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Quarterly invoice schedule needs joint review. Teams call requested by Mei-Lin for week of 2026-10-12.

servicenow_singapore_tickets.title: Container PCD-CTR-2027-B — cold-chain handoff to Pacific Star Lines
servicenow_singapore_tickets.notes: Handoff requires FDA prior notice resolution (see INC0034892).

tasting_room_bottle_club_roster.holdback_basis: Active members only. Lapsed (60+ days overdue) and paused members are not included in the 110 BBL holdback math.
tasting_room_bottle_club_roster.spring_release_cellar_basis: 60 BBL carried in the cellar for the late-May 2027 spring release window (bottle club first, tasting room second); held back from the 2027 wholesale commitment inside the 2,500 BBL annual ceiling.

tier_definitions.Standard: 1 case per month, full season cycle Nov–Mar, includes Stoneridge Saison and Appalachian Pale; pricing $85/month.
tier_definitions.Reserve: 2 cases per month, full season cycle, includes Standard tier SKUs plus quarterly Black Hollow Imperial allocation; pricing $160/month.
tier_definitions.Founders: 3 cases per month with annual barrel-program allocation including Father's Reserve and a small Experimental allocation when available; pricing $265/month, closed to new members since 2022.
